# ga-exec-statusbadge

ga.*, exec.*, statusbadge.* settings groups

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/misc/ga-exec-statusbadge` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  ga.trackingid: UA-123
  ga.anonymizeusers: "true"
  exec.enabled: "true"
  exec.shells: bash,sh
  statusbadge.enabled: "true"
  statusbadge.url: https://argocd.example.com
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    exec:
      enabled: true
      shells:
      - bash
      - sh
    googleAnalytics:
      anonymizeUsers: true
      trackingID: UA-123
    statusBadge:
      enabled: true
      url: https://argocd.example.com
```
